error.message: The view 'Error' or its master was not found or no view engine supports the searched locations. The following locations were searched: ~/Views/Group/Error.aspx ~/Views/Group/Error.ascx ~/Views/Shared/Error.aspx ~/Views/Shared/Error.ascx ~/Views/Group/Error.cshtml ~/Views/Group/Error.vbhtml ~/Views/Shared/Error.cshtml ~/Views/Shared/Error.vbhtml
error.detail: System.InvalidOperationException: The view 'Error' or its master was not found or no view engine supports the searched locations. The following locations were searched: ~/Views/Group/Error.aspx ~/Views/Group/Error.ascx ~/Views/Shared/Error.aspx ~/Views/Shared/Error.ascx ~/Views/Group/Error.cshtml ~/Views/Group/Error.vbhtml
